scripts.dev:hoist:path: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=hoist WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-dev-hoist-path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=src weapp-vite dev
scripts.dev:open:hoist:path: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=hoist WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-dev-hoist-path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=src weapp-vite dev -o
scripts.build:duplicate:common: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=common WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-duplicate-common weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:duplicate:path: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-duplicate-path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=src weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:duplicate:inline: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=inline WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-duplicate-inline weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:hoist:common: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=hoist WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=common WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-hoist-common weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:hoist:path: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=hoist WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-hoist-path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=src weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:hoist:inline: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=hoist WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=inline WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-hoist-inline weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:path:shared-root: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=shared WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-path-shared-root weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:path:invalid-root: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_MODE=path WEAPP_CHUNK_SHARED_PATH_ROOT=invalid WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-path-invalid-root weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:warn:on: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_LOG_OPTIMIZATION=true WEAPP_CHUNK_DUPLICATE_WARNING_BYTES=1 WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-warn-on weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm
scripts.build:warn:off: WEAPP_CHUNK_STRATEGY=duplicate WEAPP_CHUNK_LOG_OPTIMIZATION=false WEAPP_CHUNK_DUPLICATE_WARNING_BYTES=1 WEAPP_CHUNK_OUTDIR=dist-warn-off weapp-vite build --platform weapp --skipNpm

scripts.build:matrix:core: pnpm run build:duplicate:common && pnpm run build:duplicate:path && pnpm run build:duplicate:inline && pnpm run build:hoist:common && pnpm run build:hoist:path && pnpm run build:hoist:inline
scripts.build:matrix:extras: pnpm run build:path:shared-root && pnpm run build:path:invalid-root && pnpm run build:warn:on && pnpm run build:warn:off && pnpm run build:warn:zero-threshold
scripts.build:matrix: pnpm run build:matrix:core && pnpm run build:matrix:extras
